reasoning: The Workers' Left Front - Unity (FIT-U) is a coalition of Trotskyist/far-left parties in Argentina that historically garners around 3-5% in national elections and holds fewer than 5-10 seats in the 257-seat Chamber of Deputies. With only half the seats up for election in 2025 and major forces like UxP (Union por la Patria, ~100+ seats), LLA (La Libertad Avanza, ~40+), and PRO (~40+) dominating Congress, it is essentially mathematically and politically impossible for FIT-U to win enough seats to hold the highest number of seats following the 2025 midterm elections. The Polymarket price reflecting a 0% probability confirms this practically impossible outcome.
